articles.title: Watch: Residents flee as cars and houses burn in Belfast
articles.description: Police and firefighters help families leave their homes amid disorder following a knife attack.

articles.title: Illegal mini-marts to shut for up to 12 months under law change prompted by BBC
articles.description: Under current rules, shops breaking the law can only be closed for up to six months in England and Wales.

articles.title: US strikes Iran in response to downing of military helicopter
articles.description: President Donald Trump earlier accused Iran of shooting down the US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and vowed to respond.
